title: Passport Link
description: A typed link between two Digital Product Passports — predecessor (original) to successor (derived after repurposing, remanufacturing, or cascaded component). Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 and ESPR both require that a successor passport reference the original.

linkedPassportId.description: The passportId of the linked passport (predecessor or successor)

linkType.description: Semantic type of the link. 'repurposed' and 'remanufactured' are battery regulation terms; 'cascaded_component' is used for disassembly; 'corrected_version' for regulatory data corrections.

linkedBy.description: Actor (BPN or DID) who created this link
